title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXLIV. Love And Matrimony.
content:
What care I how black I be,
        Twenty pounds will marry me;
        If twenty won't, forty shall,
        I am my mother's bouncing girl!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXLIV. Love And Matrimony."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
